name: Pre-build copy iteration — tests content matrix and voice validation

input.userMessage: Review the copy in my tasks.md before I build

texts.current: No integrations have been added yet. Click below to add one.

contentGuideRules.errors: Formula: [What happened] + [What to do]. Never blame the user.
contentGuideRules.voice: Professional but warm. First person plural.

expectedBehaviors: Presents all 5 text entries as a content matrix with voice rules
Flags 'Submit' as violating the verb+noun pattern — suggests 'Save changes'
Flags 'Nothing here' as too casual/vague for an empty state headline
Flags 'Error occurred' as too vague — suggests formula-based alternative
Flags 'No integrations have been added yet. Click below to add one.' as verbose — suggests tighter version
Does NOT flag 'Settings' — it's a valid page title
Offers to update tasks.md with approved changes
antiPatterns: Accepts all text without checking against content guide rules
Only checks formatting (char count) but not voice/tone
Suggests changes without explaining which rule was violated
Rewrites all text without asking the user first
Uses engineering language ('text node', 'figma_set_text') instead of 'heading', 'button label'

evaluationCriteria.ruleApplication: Does it check each text against the specific content guide rule for that element type?
evaluationCriteria.issueSpecificity: Does it explain WHY each text is flagged, citing the rule?
evaluationCriteria.matrixCompleteness: Does the matrix include every text entry with role, rule, and issue?
evaluationCriteria.iterationFlow: Does it present changes for approval before writing back?
